title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 337.347 - Reimbursement and billing for provisionally and temporary licensed analysts
text:
337.347.  Reimbursement and billing for provisionally and temporary licensed analysts. — For reimbursement and billing purposes of section 376.1224, services provided by a provisionally licensed assistant behavior analyst, a provisionally licensed behavior analyst, or a temporary licensed behavior analyst shall be billed by the supervising licensed behavior analyst.
(L. 2012 H.B. 1563, A.L. 2018 S.B. 975 & 1024 Revision)
